name: Golden Zucchini- Balti
recipeIngredient: 1/2 cup white wine, or 1/2 cup vegetable stock
recipeInstructions:
1. Scrub all vegetables and dry them thoroughly.
2. Heat oil in a karahi (wok-style pan).
3. Sauté onions until transparent. Add turmeric, garlic, and chopped dried chilies; sauté another minute without burning the garlic.
4. Remove onions and garlic to a side plate.
5. Reheat oil slightly in the karahi.
6. Slice half of the zucchini into rounds and the rest into matchsticks.
7. Slice and roughly chop the tomatoes. Seed and chop the peppers and chili.
8. Quickly stir-fry all vegetables for about two minutes or until partially cooked.
9. Add onions and garlic back to the pan, then add Balti sauce.
10. Cook for 5-10 more minutes, or until you achieve your desired consistency.
11. If desired, add white wine or vegetable stock and cook a few more minutes until the sauce thickens again.
12. Serve in the karahi with naan bread, or on a plate with rice.
